title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 02 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 02 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 02 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/02/2024
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower, roseing sharply trends in the day. an decrease of 2.23% throughout the day; part of the business quotation shipping mentality turn weak. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
